national_mail_in: see gold-domains buyers.ts — scored tier, available in all metros

buyers.name: Seattle Gold
buyers.payout_claims: Publishes a payout floor: minimum "80% of the spot" for scrap gold; says average payout was "91% of the market rate of gold" (2017 figure); marketing pages claim up to 99% of melt for some items
buyers.testing_transparency: What-we-pay page explains how offers are built (composition of the gold, subtractions for stones) but does not name the testing instrument.
buyers.evidence_notes: One of the few local buyers anywhere that publishes payout percentages and a today's-gold-prices page; 'no pressure to sell and no costs for testing'; BBB accredited and authorized DNA dealer for the Royal Canadian Mint; also runs a mail-in service.

buyers.name: Bellevue Rare Coins
buyers.address: 321 Bellevue Way NE, Bellevue, WA 98004 (also Lynnwood, Issaquah, Tacoma)
buyers.payout_claims: "Top dollar paid for your valuables — payments issued same-day, with no wait" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Site says "We determine the weight and metal's purity" and examine items for intrinsic value and condition — method not named.
buyers.evidence_notes: "Trusted gold and silver buyer since 1979" (originally West Seattle Coins); BBB A+ accredited; GIA-certified diamond buyers on staff; four locations, walk-ins welcome at all.

buyers.name: Pacific West Precious Metals (Pacific Iron & Metal)
buyers.payout_claims: "Pays you on the spot" with "no waiting period for conducting a metal melt" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Site says they test your gold, silver, platinum or palladium on site — method not named; no charges for 'melt loss.'
buyers.evidence_notes: Precious-metals desk of Pacific Iron & Metal, self-described "Western Washington's longest-running precious metal buying business"; explicit 'no hidden fees and charges for melt loss' language; SoDo industrial location.

buyers.name: Elemetal — Seattle (Tukwila)
buyers.payout_claims: "Most lots are processed and settled in 1-2 hours or less" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Testing method not described on the location page; refinery-grade settlement implied by the parent brand.
buyers.evidence_notes: Local desk of 'America's Largest Precious Metal Refiner' (45 locations); 'no hidden fees — our services are clear, straightforward'; free shipping insurance on its Express Shipping Program; walk-in during business hours. Audience skews trade (dealers, jewelers, pawnbrokers) — confirm public retail lots are accepted.

buyers.name: Northwest Gold & Diamond
buyers.payout_claims: "We average 60% more than mail-in buyers, 40% more than the Mall buyers and 20% more than the local stores"; "pay you on the spot"
buyers.testing_transparency: Site says "Using State of the Art equipment we are able to test while you wait, make an up-front offer, and pay you on the spot"; scales described as calibrated Legal For Trade digital scales.
buyers.evidence_notes: "State and Multi-City Licensed and Insured"; 'over 37 years serving the Northwest'; serves Renton/Kent/Auburn/Seattle/Bellevue; comparative payout claims are its own unverified marketing math; hours not posted.
